title: Seri's 3D Custom totem
description: This Texture pack allows You to change The totem texture with your own skin in minecraft
body:
**Seri's 3D Custom Totems**
Fully Customizable 3D Totems of Undying for Minecraft

Tired of the same old Totem of Undying? Want to show off your style even when you're on the brink of death? Seri's 3D Custom Totems is the texture pack for you!

_This pack replaces the default Totem of Undying with fully 3D-modeled totems, adding a whole new level of visual flair and immersion. But it doesn’t stop there — this pack is built with customization at its core. You can easily swap out textures or edit your own, allowing you to create a totally personalized look for your totems._

Perfect for content creators, survival players, or anyone who wants their life-saving moment to look epic.

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7db4399f908626b037f58ed38b5c1a165021ad7d_0.webp)

**✨ Features:**
- > 1. - 
- > 1. - **Detailed 3D Models:** Every totem is brought to life with rich, dimensional design.
- > 1. - 
- > 1. - **Customizable Textures:** Swap out files or add your own textures with ease — no coding required!
- > 1. - 
- > 1. - **Performance-Friendly:** Optimized for smooth gameplay, even on lower-end machines.
- > 1. - 
- > 1. - **Survival & Creative Friendly:** Works seamlessly in all game modes.
- > 1. - 
- > 1. - **Compatible with Most Versions:** Built to work with modern Minecraft versions and other popular resource packs.

Bring character to your clutches and style to your survival — because staying alive should look amazing.
